parents.subject: LU-18687 lnet: match compat headers to linux headers

commit.subject: LU-19944 utils: Add parse_opts_early()
commit.message:
LU-19944 utils: Add parse_opts_early()

Introduce common parse_opts_early() to parse some necessary
options early.

Signed-off-by: Xiao Yang <xyang@ddn.com>
